principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix organic textures with clean tech utility.
Emotion First: Every screen must feel 'safe' and 'welcoming'.
Content is King: The lesson content (video/text) is the hero.
Zoom In: Use close-ups of people/hands to create intimacy.
Negative Space: Generous breathing room to prevent cognitive overload.

typography.instructions: Import 'Merriweather' (400, 700, 900) and 'Nunito' (400, 600, 700) from Google Fonts. Apply 'font-serif' to all Headings and 'font-sans' to body text.

primary.name: Deep Sage
primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, key icons

buttons.classes: rounded-full px-8 py-6 font-semibold shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300

cards.classes: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-[#E8E4D9] shadow-[0_2px_10px_rgba(0,0,0,0.03)] hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.06)] transition-all duration-300

inputs.classes: rounded-xl border-[#E8E4D9] bg-[#F9F8F6] focus:ring-[#4A6741] focus:border-[#4A6741] h-12

navigation.mobile: Bottom tab bar with soft blur backdrop-blur-lg bg-white/90 border-t border-[#E8E4D9]
navigation.desktop: Clean top bar with generous spacing

images.description: Diverse group sitting on grass, used for Landing Page Hero or Community section.
Indoor classroom setting, used for Courses List or Teacher Dashboard.
Bible and coffee on table, used for Lesson Detail or Resources section.
Large congregation, used for Events or About page.

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' with soft stroke width (1.5px or 2px). Avoid sharp edges.

layout_strategies.grid_system: Simple 1-col mobile, 3-col desktop. Use 'max-w-md mx-auto' for mobile-centric flows like Auth.
layout_strategies.containers: Use 'container mx-auto px-4 md:px-8' for main content wrappers.

universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': Do not use generic gradients or default Shadcn styles without customization.
Micro-interactions: Add 'active:scale-95' to all buttons for tactile feel.
Accessibility: Ensure text contrast is high (Forest Charcoal on Warm Bone).
Data-TestID: All interactive elements MUST have 'data-testid' attributes.
Empty States: Never leave a list empty. Use a friendly illustration or icon with encouraging text.
Loading States: Use skeletons with a 'shimmer' effect, not just spinners.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install 'Merriweather' and 'Nunito' fonts immediately. 2. Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the 'Organic & Earthy' color palette. 3. Customize Shadcn components (Button, Card, Input) to match the 'pill-shaped' and 'soft-organic' styles defined above. 4. Build the Mobile Navigation Bar first as it is the core of the mobile-first experience.
